name: TheSimpleClimbGame
short_description: This is a game where you climb by jumping, sprinting, and slowing, while being careful not to fall. The only thing you can do to escape from a world where one day suddenly no one is left is to climb. If you keep climbing without giving up, you will definitely be able to escape.
detailed_description:
Climb, Just Keep Going


This is a game where you climb, using jumps, sprint, and slows, while being careful not to fall.
You can save it, but it will be deleted once you load it.
The only thing you can do to escape from a world where one day, suddenly, no one is around is to climb.

I don't know why I'm here, but when I realized it, there was no one around, and the town wasn't supposed to be this small.

For some reason, something is floating in the sky, and it looks like a road somewhere.

Is it all I can do to climb? I don't know, but that's all I can do now. I'll try to go as far as I can.
